title: Flicker returns to KIWOOM DRX after loan spell at CREST
description: Kiwoom DRX expands to a six-man roster after the return of Flicker.
author: jenopelle

title: Sharks circles Xi Lai Gaming's roster, joins as sixth man
description: XLG promotes a second team member to its bench ahead of Stage 2.
author: jenopelle

title: TYLOO, DRG jump ahead in week one of China Stage 2
description: In the first week of VCT China 2026 Stage 2, TYLOO and DRG won both games to lead their respective groups, while EDG, AG, and XLG wait to debut after EWC.
author: weivy

title: Team Secret releases BerserX and Rimuru
description: A double exit for Team Secret, with Stage 2 set to start in just a few days.
author: jenopelle

title: 100 Thieves emerge victorious at EWC 2026
description: 100 Thieves overcome NRG to win EWC 2026, while Nongshim takes third place over BBL.
author: raezeri

title: 100T and NRG set up all-Americas grand final at EWC 2026
description: The 2026 EWC Trophy will find itself in the hands of a North American team.
author: jenopelle

title: T1's carpe to step away from competitive play
description: After playing out his entire Valorant career with T1, carpe is stepping away from Esports.
author: jenopelle

title: Eternal Fire adds casteLL0 as assistant coach ahead of Stage 2
description: Some bolstering for the Turkish squad ahead of Stage 2.
author: jenopelle

title: Notexxd out of Cloud9, v1c to return from VCL
description: Cloud9's Controller has replaced his replacement after two months away from the organization.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Nongshim, 100T fight through EWC playoff quarterfinals
description: Nongshim Redforce and 100 Thieves both defeated and eliminated Team Vitality and MIBR in 2-1 fashion in the Esports World Cup 2026 quarterfinals.
author: weivy

title: GIANTX imports neT as in-game leader
description: The North American Sentinel most recently competed with FlyQuest in Challengers.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Heretics, Gentle Mates sent home early from EWC playoffs
description: BBL and NRG will face in the semifinals.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Game Changers EMEA grand finals returns to ESA Arena
description: Tickets will go on sale on August 3.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Gen.G ushers in new era with Efina, Raxcal
description: The former F4Q, IAM player finally gets his Tier 1 shot, while an exciting rookie enters the mix for Gen.G.
author: jenopelle

title: Gen.G shuts down ZynX for the rest of 2026 due to wrist injury
description: After struggling with a wrist injury during Stage 1, Gen.G shuts down ZynX for the rest of the year to prioritize his recovery.
author: jenopelle
